summary: "Evidence-capture and PoC-redaction discipline for bug-bounty submissions: cookie redaction protocol (which fields to mask, Preview annotation / Burp panel hiding / DevTools workflow), PII black-bar d
preconditions: Skill evidence-hygiene has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching evidence-hygiene
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
